workflows.name: Seasonal work planning, dispatch, and verified closure
workflows.purpose: Convert a field observation into assigned block work while preserving blocked, partial, resumed, completed, and verified states.
triggers: Seasonal plan reaches its execution window
A blocked work order becomes safe to resume
preconditions: The operational block resolves to one stable identity
The observation is timestamped and attributable
The assigned crew can see safety and completion requirements

steps.description: The viticulturist records a weed escape against the stable block identity.
The viticulturist recommends mechanical undervine mowing before the next irrigation set.
The vineyard manager sets priority, acreage, timing, and accountable field assignees.
The equipment operator begins the west-to-east mowing pass and reports progress through the foreman.
The foreman stops work after a hydraulic-pressure alarm and records the affected rows and safe partial acreage.
The foreman closes the safe west pass as partial rather than misreporting the entire block as complete.
The manager confirms repair evidence and releases the remaining rows for the same accountable work order.
The operator completes the remaining rows and records final treated acreage.
The manager compares the completed acreage and row coverage with the plan before verifying closure.

decisions.question: Can safe completed acreage be retained while the affected rows remain blocked?
outcomes: Record safe partial completion and isolate affected rows
Void progress and reschedule the whole block

decisions.question: Is the repair evidence sufficient to release the remaining rows?

outputs: Actual acreage for cost and progress reporting
handoffs: Field completion back to vineyard manager
approvals: Vineyard manager releases work after repair evidence
exceptions: Unsafe attempt to resume without repair evidence
workarounds: Split the safe completed acreage from affected rows without losing one work-order history
source_anchors: Workflow card: seasonal work planning and work-order dispatch
Managers need done/not done/why not visibility across estates and crews
field_validation_questions: Which role may release a blocked work order after equipment repair in each operating organization?
